title: Tinted Beacons
description: Allows for invisible beacon beams with tinted glass
body:
Allows for tinted glass to "dye" beacon beams invisible. 

Made for hit epic youtuber [RyanTheScion](https://www.youtube.com/@ryanthescion)


This is a client side mod, so you can use this on any server as you please :)


#Warning 
*Very* jank for the time being if you try to make a single beam go invisible to visible repeatably, I will release a patch to fix this soon 


If you have any suggestions you can contact on discord (bishan_#4378)
